skill.name: database-schema-design
skill.description: Design and optimize database schemas for SQL and NoSQL databases. Use when creating new databases, designing tables, defining relationships, indexing strategies, or database migrations. Handles PostgreSQL, MySQL, MongoDB, normalization, and performance optimization.
skill.summary: Design and optimize database schemas for SQL and NoSQL databases. Provides step-by-step guidance for entity definition, relationship modeling, indexing, constraints, and migration scripts.
skill.author: supercent-io

security_audit.summary: Static scanner flagged 148 potential issues. Manual review confirms ALL findings are FALSE POSITIVES. The skill is pure markdown documentation containing SQL example code blocks, not executable content. No malicious patterns, no external command execution, no credential exfiltration. Safe for publication.

low_findings.title: External Commands False Positive
low_findings.description: Scanner detected 'Ruby/shell backtick execution' - these are markdown code fences (```) containing SQL examples, not executable code
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: Markdown documentation file with SQL code examples in fenced blocks - not executable Ruby code

low_findings.title: Hardcoded URLs False Positive
low_findings.description: Scanner flagged 'Hardcoded URL' - these are legitimate documentation links to PostgreSQL, MySQL, and MongoDB official documentation
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: Standard reference links to official database documentation, not credential exfiltration or malicious network calls

low_findings.title: Path Traversal False Positive
low_findings.description: Scanner flagged 'Path traversal sequence' - these are relative links to related skill files in documentation
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: Documentation links to related skills using standard relative paths - not file system vulnerability

low_findings.title: Weak Cryptographic Algorithm False Positive
low_findings.description: Scanner flagged 'password_hash' field name as weak crypto - this is a legitimate database column name for storing hashed passwords
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: Database schema documentation showing standard field naming convention - not actual weak cryptographic implementation

content.value_statement: This skill helps AI assistants design optimized database schemas for SQL and NoSQL databases. It provides structured guidance for entity modeling, relationship design, indexing strategies, and migration scripts.
actual_capabilities: Design entity-relationship diagrams for SQL and NoSQL databases
Create normalized database schemas with proper primary keys and foreign keys
Define indexing strategies for query performance optimization
Write database migration scripts with up and down paths
Implement constraints, triggers, and data validation rules
Optimize schema for different workloads (OLTP vs OLAP)
limitations: Does not execute database operations or queries
Does not provide hosting or infrastructure configuration
Does not generate application code (ORM models, API endpoints)
Does not perform database security auditing

use_cases.title: New Application Development
use_cases.description: Design a complete database schema from scratch for a new web or mobile application

use_cases.title: Schema Refactoring
use_cases.description: Analyze and redesign existing database schemas for better performance or scalability

use_cases.title: Migration Planning
use_cases.description: Create safe migration scripts to evolve database schema over time

prompt_templates.title: Basic Schema Design
prompt_templates.prompt: Design a database schema for a [domain description]. Use [database type]. Include entities: [list entities] with relationships: [describe relationships].
prompt_templates.scenario: Starting a new project and need initial database design

prompt_templates.title: Schema with Performance
prompt_templates.prompt: Design an optimized PostgreSQL schema for [domain]. Expected data volume: [small/medium/large]. Read-write ratio: [read-heavy/write-heavy/balanced]. Include indexes and constraints.

prompt_templates.title: Migration Script
prompt_templates.prompt: Create migration scripts to add a [new feature/table/column] to an existing [current schema description]. Include both up and down migrations.
prompt_templates.scenario: Evolving existing database schema with new features

prompt_templates.title: NoSQL Schema Design
prompt_templates.prompt: Design a MongoDB schema for [use case]. Consider read optimization and document embedding. Include collection structures and index recommendations.

output_examples.input: Design a PostgreSQL schema for an e-commerce platform with users, products, orders, and reviews
output_examples.output: Complete schema with Users, Products, Orders, OrderItems, and Reviews tables with proper foreign keys, indexes, and constraints

output_examples.input: Create a MongoDB schema for a real-time chat application
output_examples.output: Collections for users, conversations, and messages with embedded documents for read optimization and appropriate indexes

best_practices: Always define explicit primary keys (use UUID for distributed systems)
Create indexes on foreign key columns and frequently queried fields
Use appropriate data types (DECIMAL for money, TEXT for large content)
Include timestamps (created_at, updated_at) for audit and debugging
anti_patterns: Avoid storing sensitive data in plaintext - always hash or encrypt
Do not overuse EAV (Entity-Attribute-Value) pattern - hurts query performance
Avoid premature denormalization - normalize first, denormalize only when proven necessary

faq.question: What databases does this skill support?
faq.answer: This skill supports PostgreSQL, MySQL, MongoDB, and SQLite for both SQL and NoSQL database design.

faq.question: Does this skill execute SQL?
faq.answer: No, this skill generates schema definitions and migration scripts. It does not connect to or execute commands on databases.

faq.question: Can it help with existing schema optimization?
faq.answer: Yes, provide your current schema and performance issues, and the skill will suggest optimization strategies.

faq.question: Does it handle authentication and security?
faq.answer: The skill recommends security practices like password hashing and least-privilege permissions but does not implement authentication systems.

faq.question: Can it generate ORM code?
faq.answer: No, this skill focuses on database schema design. It produces SQL DDL statements and migration scripts.

faq.question: How does it handle large datasets?
faq.answer: The skill considers data volume in design decisions and recommends partitioning, sharding, or indexing strategies for large datasets.
